history: The first audit found 20 dangling endpoints and 13 interior crossings. The DXF generator was corrected to emit continuous arc-slot boundaries and non-overlapping section material. A second audit found two post/base crossings; the integral post boundary was then corrected. This report records the final third audit.
boundary: A geometry-clean DXF does not prove production drawing completeness, tolerance selection, or external GB/T approval.
